info.title: E-Waste Collection API

post.description: Sends a 6-digit OTP to the provided mobile number.
Verifies the OTP and returns an authentication token.

get.summary: Get available user types for login selection

get.description: Returns list of top-level category types (e.g. E-Waste, Metal Scrap) with their names and images.

get.summary: Get subcategories for a category type
get.description: Returns the second-level categories (e.g. Computers & Laptops) for a given category type ID.

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: The ID of the category type

get.description: Returns specific items (e.g. Iron Scrap) with their base prices, units, and metadata.

Create a new donation pickup request
Clone an existing scrap pickup as a donation

get.summary: Get structured details for specific home appliance category
get.description: Returns attributes (Brands, Capacity, Types) and base pricing specifically for categories like AC and Microwave.

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: The ID of the category (e.g. Air Conditioner or Microwave)

get.summary: List assigned and accepted pickups for the agent
Get specific pickup details for the agent

post.summary: Verify items and update final price
Update current GPS coordinates and vehicle number

get.summary: Get dashboard counts and upcoming routes
Get counts for different pickup statuses
get.description: Get pickup stats for the user.

get.description: Get tracking timeline for a pickup request.
